---
title: "Cleaning_Wrangling"
output: html_document
---

This file focuses on converting the HDF files into easy to use and efficient TIFF files.

The environment should look like this after running the code:

Main
/ Data
// Chad
-> LandCover
-> Temperature (DAY/NIGHT)
-> Vegetation (NDVI/EVI)
// Senegal
-> LandCover
-> Temperature (DAY/NIGHT)
-> Vegetation (NDVI/EVI)
// Raw (HDF Files)

```{r}

terra_proj_path <- system.file("proj", package = "terra")

# Ensure system uses this path specifically
Sys.setenv(PROJ_LIB = terra_proj_path)
Sys.setenv(PROJ_DATA = terra_proj_path)

# Libraries
library(terra)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyterra)

```

```{r}

# Function to sort tiles into respected country regions
get_region <- function(filename) {
  if (str_detect(filename, "16v07")) {
    return("Senegal")
  } else if (str_detect(filename, "19v07")) {
    return("Chad")
  } else {
    return("Unknown_Region")
  }
}

```


```{r}

# Creating folder for temperature (DAY/NIGHT)
lst_files <- list.files("Data/Raw", pattern = "Temperature.*\\.hdf$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

for (file in lst_files) {
  region <- get_region(file)
  base_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))
  
  # Format: "Temperature.h16v07.2001.08" becomes "h16.2001.08"
  clean_suffix <- base_name %>%
    str_replace("Temperature\\.", "") %>%        
    str_replace("h?(\\d{2})v\\d{2}", "h\\1") 
  
  # Dynamic paths for the two new subfolders
  day_dir   <- file.path("Data", region, "Temperature", "Day")
  night_dir <- file.path("Data", region, "Temperature", "Night")
  
  dir.create(day_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  dir.create(night_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # Extract and save Daytime LST
  r_day <- sds(file)[1]
  
  day_path <- file.path(day_dir, paste0("Day.", clean_suffix, ".tif"))
  writeRaster(r_day, day_path, overwrite = TRUE)
  
  # Extract and save nighttime LST
  r_night <- sds(file)[5] 
  
  night_path <- file.path(night_dir, paste0("Night.", clean_suffix, ".tif"))
  writeRaster(r_night, night_path, overwrite = TRUE)
}

```

```{r}

# Creating folder for vegetation (NDVI/EVI)
veg_files <- list.files("Data/Raw", pattern = "Vegetation.*\\.hdf$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

for (file in veg_files) {
  region <- get_region(file)
  base_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))
  
  # Format: "Vegetation.h16v07.2001.08" becomes "h16.2001.08"
  clean_suffix <- base_name %>%
    str_replace("Vegetation\\.", "") %>%        
    str_replace("h?(\\d{2})v\\d{2}", "h\\1") 
  
  # Dynamic paths for the two new subfolders
  ndvi_dir <- file.path("Data", region, "Vegetation", "NDVI")
  evi_dir  <- file.path("Data", region, "Vegetation", "EVI")
  
  dir.create(ndvi_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  dir.create(evi_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # Extract and save NDVI
  r_ndvi <- sds(file)[1]
  r_ndvi_scaled <- r_ndvi * 0.00000001 # Scale factor added to make NDVI/EVI -1 to 1
  
  ndvi_path <- file.path(ndvi_dir, paste0("NDVI.", clean_suffix, ".tif"))
  writeRaster(r_ndvi_scaled, ndvi_path, overwrite = TRUE)
  
  # Extract and save EVI
  r_evi <- sds(file)[2]
  r_evi_scaled <- r_evi * 0.00000001
  
  evi_path <- file.path(evi_dir, paste0("EVI.", clean_suffix, ".tif"))
  writeRaster(r_evi_scaled, evi_path, overwrite = TRUE)
}

```

```{r}

# Creating folder for land cover type
lc_files <- list.files("Data/Raw", pattern = "LandCover.*\\.hdf$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)

for (file in lc_files) {
  region <- get_region(file)
  base_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file))
  
  # Format: "LandCover.h16v07.2001" becomes "h16.2001"
  # NOTE: Land coverage is yearly
  clean_suffix <- base_name %>%
    str_replace("LandCover\\.", "") %>%        
    str_replace("h?(\\d{2})v\\d{2}", "h\\1") 
  
  # Dynamic path for the Land Cover folder
  lc_dir <- file.path("Data", region, "LandCover")
  dir.create(lc_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # Extract and save land cover
  r_lc <- sds(file)[1]
  
  lc_path <- file.path(lc_dir, paste0("LC.", clean_suffix, ".tif"))
  writeRaster(r_lc, lc_path, datatype = "INT1U", overwrite = TRUE)
}

```

```{r}

precip_dirs <- c("Data/Senegal/Precipitation", "Data/Chad/Precipitation")

```

```{r}

for (dir_path in precip_dirs) {
  
  # Check if the directory actually exists first
  if (!dir.exists(dir_path)) {
    message("Directory not found, skipping: ", dir_path)
    next
  }
  
  # Find all files starting with "3B-MO"
  old_files <- list.files(dir_path, pattern = "^3B-MO.*\\.tif(f)?$", full.names = TRUE)
  
  if (length(old_files) == 0) {
    message("No IMERG files found to rename in: ", dir_path)
    next
  }
  
  # Loop through each file and rename it
  for (old_file_path in old_files) {
    
    # Get just the filename (e.g., "3B-MO.MS.MRG.3IMERG.20110401-S000000...")
    base_name <- basename(old_file_path)
    
    # Extract the 8-digit date string (YYYYMMDD) using regex
    # It looks for exactly 8 consecutive numbers
    date_string <- str_extract(base_name, "[0-9]{8}")
    
    if (!is.na(date_string)) {
      # Pull out the Year (first 4 characters) and Month (next 2 characters)
      year <- substr(date_string, 1, 4)
      month <- substr(date_string, 5, 6)
      
      # Construct the new clean filename
      new_name <- paste0("Precipitation.", year, ".", month, ".tif")
      new_file_path <- file.path(dir_path, new_name)
      
      # Rename
      file.rename(from = old_file_path, to = new_file_path)
      print(paste("Success:", base_name, "->", new_name))
      
    } else {
      warning(paste("Could not find a valid date in filename:", base_name))
    }
  }
}

```
